prompt: A photorealistic underwater portrait of a {argument name="subject description" default="young Asian woman"} holding her breath just below the surface. She has {argument name="hair style" default="long dark wavy hair"} floating weightlessly around her face and is wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="sheer white ruffled dress"}. She looks directly at the camera with slightly puffed cheeks and pursed lips. The scene is illuminated by bright sunlight filtering through the {argument name="environment" default="clear blue water"}, casting intricate, dappled caustic light patterns across her face, chest, and clothing. Small, delicate air bubbles float upward around her face, adding to the serene, ethereal atmosphere.
translatedPrompt: 一张超写实的水下肖像，画面中 {argument name="subject description" default="一位年轻的亚裔女性"} 正在水面下方屏住呼吸。她有着 {argument name="hair style" default="飘逸的深色波浪长发"}，在水中如失重般环绕在脸庞周围，身穿一件 {argument name="clothing" default="半透明的白色荷叶边连衣裙"}。她正视镜头，双颊微鼓，双唇紧闭。场景由透过 {argument name="environment" default="清澈蓝色水域"} 的明亮阳光照亮，在她的脸部、胸部和衣物上投射出复杂且斑驳的焦散光影。细小精致的气泡在她脸庞周围向上漂浮，增添了宁静而空灵的氛围。

breakdown.creativeCore: 水下超写实肖像：生成一张高度逼真的水下肖像，包含漂浮的头发、气泡和动态的焦散光效。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: camera]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
